data.name: Banu in the West
data.detailed_description:
Play as Banu, a young woman who moves from the Middle East to the West for one month, and watch her life turn upside down.

You control Banu in this adult visual novel where every choice matters. She struggles between her traditions and the temptations around her—meeting new people, facing danger, and discovering secret desires she never imagined.

Features:

  • Female protagonist – make decisions as Banu.

  • Choices that matter – every path can lead to love, betrayal, lust, or heartbreak.

  • Multiple routes and endings to explore.

  • Fully animated scenes with high-quality visuals.

  • Sound effects & voices – moaning, ambient sounds, and more for immersion.

  • Original music soundtrack that sets the mood.

  • Themes include: romance, lesbian love, dangerous encounters, cultural struggle, and temptation.

Will Banu stay loyal to her husband… or give in to her secret desires?

Her story is in your hands.

data.short_description: Banu has a messy past—she’s cheated before but wants to change. She spends a month in the West while her husband battles illness. Players guide her through temptations, cultural clashes, and difficult choices.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 (SP1+) or newer
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 & DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible Sound Card
  • 備註: Runs on 32-bit and 64-bit systems
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer
  • 處理器: 3.0 GHz Quad-Core CPU or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated graphics card with 1GB of VRAM
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible Sound Card
  • 備註: Recommended for a smoother experience at 1080p resolutions and higher.

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.10 (Yosemite)
  • 處理器: Intel or Apple Silicon CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: N/A
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system.
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 11 (Big Sur) or newer
  • 處理器: Apple M1 / Intel Core i5 or newer
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Metal compatible graphics
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: N/a
  • 備註: Recommended for native performance on Apple Silicon and a smoother experience.

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 18.04+, SteamOS
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 compatible graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: ALSA or PulseAudio compatible
  • 備註: Requires 64-bit processor and operating system.
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04+, SteamOS 3.x
  • 處理器: 3.0 GHz Quad-Core CPU or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated graphics card with 1GB VRAM (NVIDIA/AMD)
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: ALSA or PulseAudio compatible
  • 備註: Recommended for a smooth experience. Fully compatible with Steam Deck.
